subject: Bird Keeper — a Pokemon Trainer in a cap and apron holding a large bird cage
description: A trainer figure stands holding a large wire bird cage at their side. They wear a flat cap and what appears to be a workman-style apron or coverall, suggesting a caretaker or keeper role. The pose is relaxed but purposeful. The background is a soft natural scene with warm green tones suggesting an outdoor pastoral setting. The cage is prominently sized — larger than a typical birdcage — and appears empty or at least dimly visible inside.
